author: w3Lb
content: Plan+result in one (single-file doc edit): removed the [Unreleased] section, merged #109/#108 entries into a plain ### Changed after 0.3.0's Changed (BREAKING), #111/#106 entries into the top of 0.3.0's ### Added, dropped the now-stale 'remaining gap is the engine' tail from #106's entry (the gap was since closed), and moved the release date to 2026-06-10 since the release now includes today's work. Structure verified: 0.3.0 = Changed(BREAKING)/Changed/Added/Fixed/Changed... wait
